title: rosa afzeliana f. robusta
intro: Rosa afzeliana f. robusta, also known as the Rosa roxburghii, is a species of rose that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It is a shrub native to the Himalayan region, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, due to its bioactive compounds and flavonoids. Herbal preparations of Rosa afzeliana f. robusta include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, and it is also used in Ayurvedic medicine for its purported therapeutic properties.
